room.caption: [MtTempleC] I wonder if anyone would read it anyway...

instance.creationCode: stringToShow="The way back.#Don't use if moving forward." signSize=1
stringToShow="Did you know that the idle character's shield will block projectiles?" signSize=1
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=2 xDir=2 yDir=0 shiftChange=80 spriteChange=12
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=2 xDir=0 yDir=1 shiftChange=80 spriteChange=12
sprite_index=sInvisibleSolidMask image_xscale=2 xDir=2 yDir=0 shiftChange=80 spriteChange=12
